patch.value:
Bug class #4 (wrong exit code on failure). Error paths returned { error } which the host treats as success (exit 0). A scripted pipeline could not detect failures.

Repro (before fix):
  pm csv import /tmp/nope.csv ; echo $?   -> 0  (missing file)
  pm csv import notitle.csv ; echo $?      -> 0  (no title column)
  pm csv import ; echo $?                  -> 0  (no arg)
Expected: non-zero.

Fix: replaced return { error } with throw new Error(...) in the import handler (no-arg, read failure, missing title column) and the export handler (list-all failure). Verified all three now exit 1; export-to-stdout still exits 0.
csv import/export return error object instead of throwing (exit 0 on failure)

author: codex

patch.value: Replaced return {error} with throw in import+export handlers. Verified missing-file/no-title/no-arg all exit 1.

message: Replaced return {error} with throw in import+export handlers. Verified missing-file/no-title/no-arg all exit 1.
